data.content: Shipment complete. Feature branch knots-969c-worktree-guidance merged to main via no-ff merge (3b8647fbc396). make sanity passed (95.02% coverage). Pushed to origin/main. Changes: added worktree guidance to skills/knots.md and skills/knots_e2e.md instructing agents to use kno -C <path_to_repo> inside worktrees.
